title: Implementing NICE guidance | NICE
text:
Implementing NICE guidance | NICE Skip to content Accessibility help Search NICE… Skip to content Menu Sign in Guidance Standards and indicators Clinical Knowledge Summaries (CKS) British National Formulary (BNF) BNF for Children (BNFC) Life sciences More from NICE Home Implementing NICE guidance Applying NICE guidance in practice can enhance patient care and help streamline clinical practices.
We've put together a range of practical tools, resources and solutions that help practitioners, providers and commissioners use our guidance confidently and effectively.
Measuring the use of NICE guidance 
We work with partners including Public Health England, NHS England and NHS Improvement to support innovation and best practice.
Cost saving, resource planning and audit 
Our guidance and tools help you plan, save money, and make informed decisions to maximize the benefits of your resources.
Implementation help and advice 
Teams at NICE who work with the NHS, patients and carers, healthcare professionals and organisations to help put our guidance into practice.
Medicines and prescribing 
Support for delivering quality, safety and efficiency in the optimisation of medicines.
Into practice resources 
Practical resources and case studies showing how you can use evidence to improve care and services.
Evidence summaries
